Tutorial: ^Since it's your first time, I'll give you a freebie.
^Alright, first step, place the stick that I just gave you in this region.
^Next, you have to adjust where you strike using that slider.
^You can strike from the other side of your stick too. Just press on the empty space on the other side of your stick.
^Anyway! Now, you can charge up your striking power by holding down that button.
^Once it reaches the strength you want, just let go of the button.
^Now that you know the basics, let's play!
^Alright! Come on, don't go easy on me!
FirstTurn: ^Oops, my bad! Forgot about another thing.
^See how my stick has some things attached to it?
^Normally, you'd spin that wheel to choose a gadget.
^Then use that button right above it to use it!
^You can loot them from the enemies you beat. So keep playing!
